summary: AiSteth Phase 3 testing complete — all 29 backend tests + 8 frontend scenarios passed. Multi-patient mode, AI narrative caching, emerald-teal UI, and patient detail trends all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: All 12 NEW Phase 3 endpoints (patients CRUD, narrative cache, stats extension, assessment/snapshot filtering)
Backend: All 17 REGRESSION endpoints (root, config, assessments, snapshots, logs)
Frontend US1: Onboarding page with emerald-teal aesthetic verified
Frontend US2: Onboarding 3-step flow (consent checkbox enables Next button)
Frontend US3: Patients page - create patient flow works
Frontend US4: Patient detail page with trend chart structure
Frontend US5: Patient scan handoff to /aisteth.html with URL params
Frontend US6: /aisteth.html loads cleanly with patient metadata
Frontend US7: History page shows totalPatients stat tile (5 tiles total)
Frontend US8: Scan detail modal has all 4 tabs including new Factors tab
